pred_reason: The contract contains multiple integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities in arithmetic operations without SafeMath, matching SWC-101. It also exhibits reentrancy risks in external calls and allowance functions that violate Checks-Effects-Interactions, aligning with SWC-107. Evidence: Rebase calculation profit_.mul(_totalSupply).div(circulatingSupply_) lacks overflow checks; Custom _approve system introduces reentrancy paths when interacting with DeFi contracts; Multiple arithmetic operations use raw operators without SafeMath protection
